title: Custom Stream Collector
description: Implement a custom Collector for Java Streams that groups elements by key and applies a sliding window aggregation.

complexity.space: O(g * w) where g = groups, w = window size

requirements: Accept keyExtractor, windowSize, and aggregator parameters
Implement sliding window of configurable size
Apply aggregation function to each window
Handle edge cases: empty stream, window > elements
Finisher should produce immutable result map

few_shot_examples.prompt: Create a basic custom collector structure.
Calculate sliding window over a list.
